name: Southwest Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg. Shredded Cheddar and Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 425°F.
2 Grease a 10 x 15-inch jelly roll pan.
3 Spread dough evenly onto the prepared pan.
4 Bake for 5 minutes.
5 Remove from oven.
6 Spread with combined tomato sauce and chili powder.
7 Top with bell peppers, chilies, and cheese mixed with cilantro.
8 Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until crust is golden brown.
